agents.goal: Open this patient's chart and visit, in order, the History, Issues, Ledger, Documents, Transactions and Report tabs, then return to the patient summary.

From the top menu open Fees, then several different Reports screens, then Procedures, then Administration.
From the top menu open the Calendar, then Messages, then Fees, then one Reports screen.
